query:
Started... scope questions: Open questions for your decision:
                                                                              
  1. Normalization strategy: min-max within bucket (with 0.5 floor for bucket
  members) vs. rank-based (1 - rank/N). Rank-based is more outlier-resistant.
  Which do you prefer?                                                        
  2. Eval harness phase gap (issue #3555): eval/scenarios/extract.rs doesn't
  pass current_phase, so AC-12 regression gate will show no regression but    
  also no signal activation. Fix in col-031 scope or separate issue?        
  3. w_phase_explicit = 0.05: treat as a configurable default (operators tune 
  via InferenceConfig) or validate against eval data before enabling?

entries.title: ADR-004 col-031: Activate w_phase_explicit at 0.05; AC-16 Non-Separable from AC-12
ADR-001 col-031: Rank-Based Normalization for phase_affinity_score (1-indexed)
Eval harness phase gap: scenarios SQL omits query_log.phase despite column existing since col-028
Offline A/B eval procedure: snapshot → scenarios → run → report
ADR-005 nan-010: Per-Profile Section 5 Rendering with Independent Gating
